title: Breaking into Impel Down: Rising Conflict
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #9 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I might have seen it wrong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But I think I saw two shadows...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: five of them!? That can't be ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're the one who was yelling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We were drinking buddies for a while.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not going somewhere that Dan- Gerous!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Guess I'll have to ask someone else....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Well, see you later! Good luck escaping!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's with you all of a sudden!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sure!! If that's what you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: First, let's take care of the enemies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Run as fast as you can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Buggy the Clown's Bara Bara power explanation:
